degraded_modes.name: omit_image_metadata
degraded_modes.consumer_contract: SEO and AI consumers receive None instead of an invalid descriptor when the asset URL is blank.

degraded_modes.name: keep_existing_seo_image
degraded_modes.consumer_contract: The provider returns an optional descriptor and does not overwrite an existing SEO image when descriptor construction degrades to None.

degraded_modes.name: skip_asset_enrichment
degraded_modes.consumer_contract: AI media enrichment can proceed without dimensions or MIME when source metadata is incomplete, while preserving URL and alt text when available.

assertions: get_image_descriptor requires PortContext deadline semantics before reading MediaService
get_image_descriptor maps MediaError to typed PortError through media_error_to_port_error
MediaImageDescriptor is the only cross-module image payload exposed by the provider port
descriptor normalization keeps query/fragment-safe MIME inference and positive-only dimensions
